data.content:
This project uses the legacy `packages.config` format, which is incompatible with CPM. I'll need to:

1. Convert the `.csproj` to SDK-style with `PackageReference`
2. Create `Directory.Packages.props` for centralized versions
3. Remove `packages.config`
data.reasoningText:
This project uses the old `packages.config` format with a legacy-style `.csproj`. CPM requires `PackageReference` format — you can't use CPM with `packages.config`. The project needs to first be migrated from `packages.config` to `PackageReference`, and then CPM can be set up.

Let me explain the situation to the user. The `packages.config` format is incompatible with CPM. The project needs to be migrated to SDK-style project format with `PackageReference` first.

Let me do the conversion:

1. Convert the csproj to SDK-style with PackageReference


2. Remove the packages.config file
3. Create a Directory.Packages.props file to centralize all package versions

Now I'll proceed with the migration.

{"path": "/tmp/sv-861976a2e9484e5a8ee270931bb45a82/simple-packages-config/LegacyApp/LegacyApp.csproj", "old_str": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.8</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="Newtonsoft.Json, Version=13.0.0.0">
      <HintPath>..\packages\Newtonsoft.Json.13.0.3\lib\net45\Newtonsoft.Json.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>", "new_str": "<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net48</TargetFramework>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>"}

create file mode 100644
index 0000000..0000000
--- a/dev/null
+++ b/tmp/sv-861976a2e9484e5a8ee270931bb45a82/simple-packages-config/Directory.Packages.props
@@ -1,0 +1,9 @@
+<Project>
+  <PropertyGroup>
+    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
+  </PropertyGroup>
+  <ItemGroup>
+    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
+  </ItemGroup>
+</Project>
+

data.content:
Done. Here's what changed:

- **`LegacyApp.csproj`** — Converted from legacy format to SDK-style with `PackageReference` (version omitted, managed centrally)
- **`Directory.Packages.props`** — Created at the solution root with `Newtonsoft.Json 13.0.3` centrally managed
- **`packages.config`** — Removed (no longer needed with `PackageReference`)
